audit_items.proof_trace: close_and_free_remote() called at L857 frees remote pointer, but execution continues without return statement to L870 where setsockopt(remote->fd) accesses freed memory.
audit_items.attack_scenario: External attacker sends network data causing send() error in remote_recv_cb(), triggering close_and_free_remote() at L857, then use-after-free access at L870.
